description_long: This is a cylindrical beverage can with a metallic top and bottom, featuring a pull-tab opening mechanism. The can is predominantly light blue with bold blue and red graphics, including the text 'Cola Pepsi' and 'ONE CALORIE' prominently displayed on the front. The label also highlights 'ABSOLUTE SUGAR FREE' in a yellow and red box, and the word 'NEW YORK' is repeated around the upper rim. On one side, a detailed nutrition facts panel is visible, along with a recycling symbol and barcode. The surface appears slightly matte with a paper-like label texture over the metal. The can is typical of single-serving soft drink packaging found in urban environments.
description: A light blue, red, and blue metallic soda can labeled 'Cola Pepsi' with 'ONE CALORIE' and 'ABSOLUTE SUGAR FREE' graphics, featuring a pull-tab top and nutrition facts panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing 'Cola Pepsi', 'ONE CALORIE', and 'ABSOLUTE SUGAR FREE' graphics with the pull-tab top visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutrition facts panel, recycling symbol, and part of the 'Cola Pepsi' logo.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the nutrition facts, barcode, and the repeated 'NEW YORK' text near the rim.
description_view_3: Angled front view highlighting the 'Cola Pepsi', 'ONE CALORIE', and 'ABSOLUTE SUGAR FREE' graphics with more of the can's curvature visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Cola Pepsi' logo is prominently displayed on the front and side of the can in bold blue letters, with 'ONE CALORIE' in red. The logo is rectangular and occupies a large portion of the can's surface.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the side of the can, listing calories and other nutritional information.
